responses:
theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 A → P1 A := by
  intro hA
  have h₁ : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A) := by
    simpa using
      (Set.interior_subset : interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A))
  exact Set.Subset.trans hA h₁

theorem topological_P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A :=
by
  intro hA
  unfold Topology.P2 Topology.P1 at hA
  exact
    Set.Subset.trans hA
      (by
        simpa using
          (interior_subset :
            interior (closure (interior A)) ⊆ closure (interior A)))

theorem Topology.P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (X := X) A → Topology.P1 (X := X) A :=
by
  intro hA
  exact subset_trans hA (interior_subset)
